title: Effervescent Portuguese Yoghurt Dumplings
description: Light, peppery dumplings with a glassy-jelly consistency, they steam quickly and deliver a burst of freshness.
instructions: Whisk the egg whites in a medium bowl until they form soft peaks.
Stir in the coconut flour, salt, garlic powder, smoked paprika, and ground black pepper until the dry mix is uniform.
Fold in the natural yogurt and lemon zest, whisking until the batter is smooth.
Heat the sparkling water in a small saucepan, sprinkle the agar-agar powder over it, and stir until fully dissolved, then allow it to cool slightly.
Pour the agar-agar mixture into the batter and whisk until no lumps remain.
Bring a pot of water to a vigorous boil and set a steamer basket over it, ensuring the water does not touch the basket.
Lightly oil the steamer basket, then drop spoonfuls of the batter into the basket, spacing them about 2 cm apart.
Steam the dumplings for 10 minutes, or until they puff up and become translucent.
Remove the dumplings from the steamer, drizzle a splash of sparkling water over them, and sprinkle chopped parsley on top.
Serve the dumplings immediately, letting their effervescent, peppery flavor mingle with the glassy-jelly texture.
